## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation

## Validation

- [ ] Manual test executed
- [ ] Screenshots or recording attached (for UI changes)
- [ ] No sensitive data included

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch targets `develop`
- [ ] Related issue linked (if any)
- [ ] README/docs updated when needed
